name: Moments of Bliss
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the deep fryer to 350°F.
2. Bring water to a rolling boil. Add butter and stir until dissolved.
3. Add flour all at once. Stir vigorously to prevent the batter from sticking or burning in the pan.
4. Cook the mixture until it forms a ball in the center of the pan. Allow it to cool slightly.
5. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. An electric beater is helpful for this step.
6. Beat in sugar, nuts, and maple extract.
7. Drop the batter by half teaspoonful into deep fat heated to 350°F.
8. Fry until nicely browned, about 2 or 3 minutes. Drain on paper towel and toss with confectioners' sugar.
9. Serve warm.
Yield: 30 cookies
